paragraphs.text: Submit a new commercial vessel for inclusion in the National Registry. All fields marked with an asterisk are mandatory under Maritime Code §214.
An official portal for commercial vessel operators. All transactions are logged under Maritime Code §214 and audited quarterly by the Directorate of Vessel Affairs.
